presets.name: Hand Shredder
presets.description: Floods the board with cheap low-CRB fallacies that drain the opponent's hand constantly. Ad Hominem and Tu Quoque strip cards on attack and on defense. Hasty Generalization and Black or White add discard on wins. False Equivalence forces ties to generate more discard triggers. A single Appeal to Authority copy shuts down opponent abilities at a critical moment.

presets.name: Influence Flood
presets.description: Generates and denies Influence simultaneously. Appeal to Nature and Strawman build your INF pool fast. Loaded Question threatens direct damage to force painful choices. Slippery Slope snowballs CRB and punishes removal. Pathos closes games with direct damage regardless of CRB when the opponent is drained.

presets.name: Fortified Wall
presets.description: High-CRB defensive cards that punish attackers and survive combat. Appeal to Ignorance destroys weaker attackers on contact. Circular Reasoning survives ties and never leaves the lane. False Cause negates incoming abilities. Special Pleading absorbs one destruction to buy time. Logos draws cards to keep the hand full while the board holds firm.

presets.name: Rhetoric Blitz
presets.description: Pairs all four rhetorical techniques with high-pressure fallacies for a burst-damage package. Pathos ignores CRB entirely for guaranteed direct damage. Ethos chains CRB buffs into following plays. Loaded Language silences and cost-locks the opponent. Logos draws into more threats. Begging the Question doubles attacks and returns on ties. Strawman strips CRB to let lower cards punch through.
